title: Jumbo, Falcon de luxe - Playing in the Street, Jigsaw Puzzles Adults, Multicolor, 2 x 500 piece
features: Beautiful illustrations of children playing in the street
Illustrated by the artist Victor McLindon
Each finished jigsaw puzzle measures 49 x 35cm approx
description: From the manufacturer Jumbo, Falcon de luxe Adult Jigsaw Puzzles Falcon de luxe jigsaw puzzles are designed and crafted with a passion for excellence, celebrating our unique brand heritage and spirit of innovation. Produced using a high-quality recycled board with distinctive blue backing and special precision cutting techniques, we ensure every jigsaw piece maintains its original shape for puzzling fun that lasts. At Falcon, we combine beautifully finished, high-quality images with colourful themes, including Transport, Scenery, Nostalgia, Animals, Cottages, and Christmas, that offer something to suit every puzzler. More than just a fun challenge, puzzling is ideal for stress relief and mindfulness, providing a rewarding screen-free pastime that allows time to relax and unwind as you complete your exquisitely illustrated Falcon puzzle. Falcon Puzzle Themes Christmas Celebrate this magical time of year with a festive puzzle from Falcon de luxe. These heartwarming designs feature enchanting scenes including quaint snow-covered towns, excited children meeting Santa and families exchanging gifts around the Christmas tree. Nostalgia Remember when children would play together in the street, families would take holidays to the seaside, and local shops were the heart of the community? Turn back the clock with Falcon de luxe, and celebrate the quintessentially British traditions of yesteryear. Cottages Few scenes are more idyllic than that of a quaint cottage tucked away from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. Whether by the water or surrounded by forest, Falcon de luxe has beautifully captured these hidden gems for a tranquil puzzling experience. Scenery Visit some of the most picturesque locations the UK has to offer from the comfort of your home. From rugged coastlines to rolling countryside and everything in between, Falcon de luxe provides plenty of stunning designs sure to inspire a bout of wanderlust. Transport All aboard for transport-themed fun from Falcon de luxe. This collection shines a spotlight on many beloved modes of transport, from stunning steam trains and vintage trams to the humble family car from days gone by. Whatever your favourite mode of transport may be, Falcon has just the ticket. Animals Whether you’re a wildlife enthusiast or prefer puzzles starring pets, you will be spoiled for choice with Falcon de luxe. Our Animals range features beloved British wildlife and some of the nations favourite cute companions in a selection of beautifully illustrated scenes.
